positive: A whimsical, detailed forest spirit silhouette, depicted standing gracefully amidst oversized glowing bioluminescent flora and miniature crystal rivers. The spirit has long, flowing hair that blends with interwoven vines and moonlight. Focus on strong, clean lines and negative space. The scene must feature a harmonious blend of nature and gentle fantasy. Style: Clean linework vector illustration, high contrast, deep emerald and sapphire color palette accented with glowing aqua light and gold foil highlights. Composition: Centered, symmetrical, suitable for a repeating pattern or large central chest print. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting emphasizing the silhouette against a glowing, misty background. Print-ready, ultra-detailed.
negative: blur, text, logo, watermark, copyright, trademark, signature, graffiti, ugly, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, noise, noise, oversaturated, low detail, messy, grainy, jpeg artifacts
